_description: Known register interaction edges for STM32F103. Manually curated from RM0008.
_note: Source graph node IDs and edge targets use the graph node ID format (F103_PERIPHERAL_REGISTER_BITFIELD).

clears_by.note: Writing DR clears TXE (DR now has data to transmit)
Reading DR clears RXNE (data has been consumed)
Writing DR after reading SR with TC=1 clears TC
Writing DR after reading SR with TC=1 clears TC
Reading SR1 then SR2 clears ADDR flag
Reading SR then writing 0 to UIF clears it

depends_on.note: Enable APB2 clock for USART1 before configuring its registers
Enable APB2 clock for GPIOA before configuring pins
Enable APB2 clock for GPIOA before configuring pins
Enable APB2 clock for SPI1 before configuring
Enable APB2 clock for ADC1 before configuring
Enable APB1 clock for TIM2 before configuring
Enable APB1 clock for I2C1 before configuring
Enable APB1 clock for USART2 before configuring
Enable AHB clock for DMA1 before configuring
Set Flash wait states before increasing HCLK above 24MHz (0 WS for 0-24MHz, 1 WS for 24-48MHz, 2 WS for 48-72MHz)
Configure USART mode and word length before setting baud rate
Configure pin as output before setting output level
Configure pin as output before setting output level
